name: SLSA Build Provenance v1.2 Control Extract
population_or_context: Release provenance control baseline for software supply-chain review.
methods: Extracted the SLSA Build Provenance v1.2 purpose, model, required predicate fields, and boundary language from the official SLSA specification.

domain_fields.control_signal: Provenance predicate structure for describing how artifacts were produced
domain_fields.review_boundary: Specification-level control model, not a project-specific attestation
domain_fields.risk_interpretation: Provides a baseline for what provenance evidence should capture before a release-specific assessment can be made
domain_fields.limitations: Does not verify any specific software release, builder, repository, or dependency set
